name: saas-launch
description: End-to-end SaaS launch toolkit for a solo bootstrapped founder: the saas-launch-blueprint skill (gated ideation, PRD, prototype, build handoff) and saas-scaffold, which instantiates a deterministic pnpm + Turborepo monorepo (Next.js landing, offline-first Vite PWA, Mission Control admin, Supabase multi-tenant backend) plus a four-tier agent harness (L1-L4) with an AGENTS.md rulebook, migration and feature-tracking guard hooks, specialized subagents, and autonomous-loop gates.
